      Defective Item 10 days from delivery pTron warranty policy (at Service Centre)
      Defective item:
      • Amazon may provide support via self-help guides or on call or at doorstep, as applicable.
      • If this issue is not resolved, please contact pTron or visit the Service Centre.
      • pTron will repair the product or provide a replacement or Defective certificate, as applicable. The time taken for resolution will be as per pTron warranty policies.
      • Please check for nearest Brand service center in your location. For details click here

      Physical Damage, Wrong, Missing Items:
      • Returns will not be accepted if it is an Open Box Delivery order
      • Remote verification by image/video will be done by Amazon
      Know More

      Replacement Instructions

      Keep the item in its original condition and packaging along with MRP tag and accessories for a successful pick-up.

      Replacement verification

      During on-call support, you may be prompted to upload an image for verification. Please visit the nearest pTron Service Centre for product-related issues. Further support will be provided by the brand at their service centre as per their warranty policies.

      Ear Placement In Ear

      Impedance 32 Ohms

      About this item

      • pTron Boom Play X5 Wired Earphones with 10mm Dynamic drivers deliver Deep bass and Clear Sound || 2-in-1 Connector Supports 3.5mm AUX & Type-C ports for Universal Compatibility and Seamless Audio
      • Ergonomic Design: These Type C wired earphones feature a metal alloy body & In-Ear snug-fit that provides better sound quality and is incredibly comfortable to wear & also blocks external noises
      • In-line Controls & Mic: With in-line controls & a built-in microphone, these wired earphones with a mic allow you to easily adjust volume, skip tracks, and take calls without reaching for your phone.
      • Wide Compatibility: Type-C audio & 3.5mm Aux connector, making it easy to use these wired headphones with various smartphones, tablets, laptops, and other Type-C/3.5mm aux compatible devices.
      • 1.2m Tangle-free TPE Cable | S/M/L Size Silicone Eartips for Perfect Fit | 6 Months manufacturer warranty from the date of purchase on manufacturing defects only
      › See more product details

      How are ratings calculated?
      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
      Sponsored

      Customers say

      Customers find these earphones to be of good quality and value for money, with awesome sound quality and a 1.2m tangle-free cable. The connectivity and reliability receive mixed feedback - while they connect easily with Type-C iPhones, some report issues with the C-type connector, and while they work well for calls, some units are faulty. The call quality and durability also get mixed reviews, with some praising the HD mic for crystal-clear calls while others find the voice quality poor.

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Versatile Type-C & 3.5mm Earphones: Clear Sound, Great Calls, Total Value!
      These earphones are super convenient—they work seamlessly with both Type-C and 3.5mm jack phones, no adapters needed. Sound quality is crystal clear and enjoyable for music or podcasts, and call quality holds up well even in noisy spots. They pair effortlessly with Type-C iPhones too, making them a versatile, value-for-money pick that punches above its price.
